headline: Micron Soars 9%: 3 Reasons the Memory Supercycle Is Reasserting Itself After a Rough Week
summary: Micron Technology (NASDAQ:MU) shares are up 9% in Wednesday morning trading, climbing from an opening price of $337.84 to around $370. The bounce follows a brutal stretch in which MU shares had declined 14.55% over the past week, dragged lower by fears surrounding Google’s TurboQuant memory-compression algorithm. Today’s rally signals that investors may be reassessing ... Micron Soars 9%: 3 Reasons the Memory Supercycle Is Reasserting Itself After a Rough Week

headline: Applied Materials Stock Climbs 33% YTD: Time to Buy, Sell or Hold?
summary: AMAT stock surges 33% YTD, but premium valuation raises questions - can strong AI-driven demand and product breadth justify buying now?
